scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/tsconfig-base || true; npm run build -w packages/be-core && npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w apps/auth && npm run build -w apps/seat-reservation && npm run build -w apps/payment
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/be-core && npm run typecheck -w packages/contracts && npm run typecheck -w apps/auth && npm run typecheck -w apps/seat-reservation && npm run typecheck -w apps/payment
scripts.test: npm test -w apps/auth && npm test -w apps/seat-reservation && npm test -w apps/payment
